data.title: Anbio Biotech launches Chikungunya rapid test & 15-min PCR system for outbreak detection globally.
data.description: Anbio is dedicated to enhancing point-of-care diagnostics for the early detection of outbreaks globally, focusing on mosquito-borne diseases as well as emerging respiratory pathogens. Their efforts aim to rapidly identify and address health threats on a worldwide scale.

data.title: President Trump nominates Stephen Miran to temporarily join the Fed Board of Governors, filling vacancy left by Adriana Kugler.
data.description: If the nomination is approved, Stephen Miran, the current head of the Council of Economic Advisers, will temporarily assume the role left by Adriana Kugler, who is departing ahead of schedule.

data.title: Temporary Fed pick Stephen I. Miran could impact interest rate talks during his brief tenure, shaping next leader decisions.
data.description: Stephen I. Miran, a member of the central bank's board of governors, may have a short tenure of just a few months, yet during this time, he holds sway over important discussions relating to interest rates and the selection of the institution's future leader.

data.title: Stephen Miran, a Trump ally, may join Fed, advocating for weak dollar and lower rates. Markets could be impacted.
data.description: Stephen Miran, a high-ranking consultant to the president, is anticipated to assume a position as governor at the central bank. He has been advocating for a devalued dollar and reduced interest rates as part of his economic strategy.

data.title: Intel’s CEO stands firm amid calls for resignation by Trump over alleged Chinese investments, pledges loyalty to company.
data.description: After being urged by President Trump to resign due to alleged Chinese investments, Intel's CEO, Lip-Bu Tan, reaffirmed his dedication to the company.

data.title: Is Russia economically strong enough to withstand Trump's sanctions? Kremlin can continue Ukraine fight despite slowing economy. #Russia #Trump #sanctions
data.description: Even prior to President Trump's recent warnings, the Russian economy was already showing signs of weakening. Despite this, the Kremlin possesses sufficient financial resources to continue its conflict in Ukraine.

data.title: Taiwan faces 20% tariffs, no trade deal, and political instability, affecting export manufacturers.
data.description: Manufacturers in Taiwan are experiencing higher tariffs from the U.S. compared to neighboring countries, resulting in increased financial pressure. Additionally, they are grappling with a strengthening currency, exacerbating their challenges.

data.title: Japan voices displeasure over tariff error by Trump; US-Japan tensions rise with conflicting trade deal views.
data.description: Recent tensions have been escalating between the United States and Japan over a trade deal that was sealed last month, with both countries holding contrasting views on the agreement.

data.title: Executive order by Trump expands investment options for 401(k) to include crypto, private equity, real estate. Employers proceeding cautiously.
data.description: The executive order is designed to provide investors with increased investment choices. However, experts predict that employers will proceed cautiously before incorporating alternative assets into their portfolios.

data.title: Disney settles lawsuit filed by Gina Carano over firing from "The Mandalorian" for expressing controversial views.
data.description: Following her removal from "The Mandalorian," Gina Carano filed a lawsuit against Disney. The decision was taken after she posted conspiracy theories and expressed right-wing views on social media platforms. This legal action is significant as Carano had been a prominent part of the show and her sudden departure garnered attention. Disney's move to dismiss her resulted in controversy, with her supporters defending her actions. The lawsuit highlights the ongoing debate around freedom of expression and the consequences for public figures. The case is unfolding against the backdrop of growing scrutiny of public statements made by individuals in the entertainment industry. It reflects a broader discussion regarding the responsibilities and repercussions faced by individuals who hold influential positions. The legal battle between Carano and Disney has drawn considerable interest, with people closely following the developments. The outcome of this lawsuit could have implications for similar situations in the future.

data.title: India purchased Russian oil, creating tension in trade with the US. Can Modi reduce reliance on discounted Russian oil?
data.description: If Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi were to align with American President Donald Trump, would it be challenging to reduce the country's reliance on Russia's discounted trade, which currently stands at approximately 60% of total imports?

data.title: First National Bank Alaska's Q2 2025: Net income $18.4M, loans $2.6B, nonperforming loans $9.8M, Return on Assets 1.46%.
data.description: First National Bank Alaska reported a net income of $18.4 million, or $5.80 per share, for the second quarter of 2025, compared to $15.6 million, or $4.94 per share, for the same period in 2024. Loans totaled $2.6 billion as of June 30, 2025, with nonperforming loans at $9.8 million, 0.38% of outstanding loans. The provision for credit losses in 2025 was $2.2 million, up from $1.3 million in 2024. Interest income was $57.0 million in Q2 2025, with assets totaling $4.9 billion. Shareholders' equity stood at $550.1 million as of June 30, 2025. Return on equity in 2025 was 13.53%, up from 12.30% in 2024. The bank's Tier 1 leverage capital ratio as of June 30, 2025, was 11.95%. Full story available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: First National Bank Alaska reported $18.4 million net income in Q2 2025, up from $15.6 million in Q2 2024.
data.description: Alaska-based First National Bank reported a net income of $18.4 million in the second quarter of 2025, translating to $5.80 per share. This marks an increase from the $15.6 million net income, or $4.94 per share, recorded in the corresponding quarter of 2024.

data.title: Gold and tech stocks lead top ratings, including AngloGold Ashanti on IBD's lists. New names on IBD's lists like IBD 50 and Big Cap 20.
data.description: Discover the latest inclusion of top-rated stocks such as the gold miner AngloGold Ashanti on Investor's Business Daily's prestigious lists of the best growth stocks. The recently updated lists, including IBD 50 and Big Cap 20, showcase the dominance of both the gold and tech sectors. Explore the new additions that are making waves in the market as investors seek growth opportunities.

data.title: Questerre's Q2 2025 results announced, not intended for US distribution.
data.description: This press release is not intended for distribution in the United States or to US news outlets and individuals.

data.title: C3 AI restructures sales & services org for growth, appointing Rob Schilling as EVP & Chief Commercial Officer.
data.description: In Redwood City, California, C3 AI, a leading Enterprise AI software company listed on NYSE as AI, recently completed a restructuring of its global sales and services organization during Q1. This restructuring saw the introduction of new leadership, with Rob Schilling appointed as EVP and Chief Commercial Officer effective June 16, 2025. In his new role, Schilling will oversee all sales, customer-facing teams, and Alliances. He brings extensive experience as an enterprise application sales leader to the company.

data.title: C3 AI reports preliminary financial results for Q1 2026. Full results to be disclosed on September 3, 2025.
data.description: C3.ai, Inc. unveiled initial financial figures for the fiscal first quarter concluding on July 31, 2025. The information, which remains unaudited, offers a glimpse into the company's performance. Full results for this period will be disclosed on September 3, 2025, along with an overview of fiscal 2026 projections. Thus, the Enterprise AI software firm, also known as C3 AI, is set to release a comprehensive report on its financial standing and future expectations in early September.

data.title: Blade Air Mobility to present at Oppenheimer conference on August 11, 2025 at 2:55pm ET. CFO, Will Heyburn, to present. Webcast and replay available.
data.description: On August 8, 2025, Blade Air Mobility, Inc. disclosed that their Chief Financial Officer, Will Heyburn, is scheduled to speak at the Oppenheimer 28th Annual Technology, Internet & Communications Conference on August 11, 2025, at 2:55pm ET. This event will be accessible via webcast, with a replay of the presentation available on the investor relations portion of Blade's website at https://ir.blade.com/news-events. Blade Air Mobility, Inc. is listed as "BLDE" on the Nasdaq.

data.title: Q-Gold updates activities, acquires Quartz Mountain Project in Oregon from Alamos Gold Inc. Read press release for details.
data.description: On August 8, 2025, Q-Gold Resources Ltd. (TSXV: QGR) shared an update on their recent and upcoming activities, particularly regarding the mineral exploration project in south-central Oregon known as the Quartz Mountain Project. The company is in the process of acquiring this project from Alamos Gold Inc. as per a share exchange agreement from March 31, 2025. More details about this acquisition and the project can be found in the press release dated April 3, 2025, accessible on the Company’s SEDAR+ profile at www.sedarplus.ca.

data.title: Thumzup Media Corp (Nasdaq: TZUP) announces public offering of Series D shares, disrupting advertising industry.
data.description: Los Angeles, August 8, 2025 - Thumzup Media Corporation (Nasdaq: TZUP) disclosed plans for a new public offering of shares for its Series D, aiming to raise capital for its digital asset aggregation and advertising ventures. The Company has initiated this effort in a bid to further disrupt the advertising industry and expand its operations. The move comes as Thumzup continues to bolster its presence in the market, with a clear focus on growth and innovation.
